user_system_path: Sweep every money-loop surface for the same defect class as #348
allowed_files_raw: lib/workday-presence/**, app/api/workday-presence/**, app/api/slack/**, lib/slack/**, and control-plane files
forbidden_files_raw: No schema, no UI, no e2e tests, no dependency changes.
required_local_proof: npx vitest run lib/workday-presence/ app/api/workday-presence/ lib/slack/ app/api/slack/ && npm run build && npm run gate:continuity
acceptance_condition: All money-loop surfaces are proven to surface errors on durable receipt write failure instead of reporting false success.
stop_condition: Stop when issue #351 has a merged PR with gate + build + vitest proof.
next_command: Fix defects and prove with tests, push, and open PR.
